summary: The basin lifecycle bridge is directionally safe because closure is tied to replay-backed promotion rather than assertion. The main follow-up is to dogfood the reviewer against this exact change and keep source-run evidence attached to the proposal.

warnings.concern: A basin should not be marked closed directly from proposal creation or replay alone.

suggestions.suggestion: Require source-run evidence from codebase-trace-reviewer when a proposal claims to close a basin.
